name: Chaos Machina
short_description: Chaos Machina is a fast-paced action roguelike designed for immersive, bite-sized runs. Enter the flow state as you weave with your robot through enemy fire. Unleash powerful upgrades, and master 10-minute bursts of adrenaline before the Chaos reclaims the map.
detailed_description:
Chaos Machina is a fast-paced action roguelike designed for immersive, bite-sized runs. Enter the flow state as you weave with your robot through enemy fire. Unleash powerful upgrades, and master 10-minute bursts of adrenaline before the Chaos reclaims the map.

Gameplay

  • Run into generated dungeons and fight robots corrupted by Chaos AI

  • Deal as much damage as possible through your robot

  • You need to dodge all the enemy attacks ahead of you

  • Survive as long as possible against 13 enemy types

  • Use 15 different abilities to clear the map

  • 0 wasting of your time, each run should take no more than 10 minutes

  • Use 135 upgrades for your abilities to find your own way
